summary: Frontend regression test PASSED - All 7 major pages load correctly after onboarding UI component additions (WelcomeModal, GettingStartedPanel, HelpPopover). Login flows work for both management and owner roles. No breaking changes detected.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML nesting warning: button inside button causes hydration error warning in console. HelpPopover trigger is placed inside a button element on OverviewPage rubric toggle.

action_items: MINOR: Fix HTML nesting issue - HelpPopover trigger (button) is nested inside another button on OverviewPage line 131. Consider using a span or div wrapper instead of button for the rubric toggle, or move HelpPopover outside the button.
critical_code_review_comments: HelpPopover.jsx line 8: The PopoverTrigger renders a button, but it's being placed inside other button elements (e.g., OverviewPage rubric toggle). This causes React hydration warnings. Consider using asChild prop differently or restructuring the parent elements.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, all onboarding components work

test_credentials: Management: hjohnny.super@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, Owner: sadam.owner@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, Crew access: /crew/3c04af36
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified onboarding UI components (WelcomeModal, GettingStartedPanel, HelpPopover) across all 7 major pages. All components render correctly with role-specific content. WelcomeModal shows different step counts per role (5 for Supervisor, 6 for Owner). GettingStartedPanel shows role-specific quick start guides. Theme toggle is in Settings page (not header). Minor HTML nesting warning exists but doesn't break functionality.
